channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Greco EGB-850 Les Paul bass w/gig bag — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Very Good · Frosty's Gear and Gizmos

Original vintage Fujigen Greco EBG-850 bass in gorgeous playing condition! Greco’s top of the line bass, the EGB-850 was a rocker! Modeled with a Les Paul custom esthetic, she features massive, high output humbuckers, gold everything, and EB-0 length 30.5” scale. I cannot say enough about those magical pickups… hot without being farty, DEEP, yet detailed.

These Grecos run circles around anything Gibson USA was producing at the time, (or since), and actually prefigured Gibson’s own LPB series.

This old girl is no exception and has accumulated all of the exterior finish and play wear one would expect of a genuine warhorse over the years, as the good ones do. Tons of mojo and patina, and lots of finish chipping, especially around the sides, and lower bout. All earned, all deserved, all dead sexy. No cracks, breaks, or repairs. She ships in a gig bag. Enjoy!

item.title: USED Fender Standard Precision Bass MIM, Black — $629
item.description:
$629 · Very Good · Goodtime Music

Free shipping and no tax (to most states, outside of IL) on our website!

Looking for a rock solid classic bass that can do it all? This Fender Standard Precision Bass, made in Mexico, is about as good as it gets for anything from rock, to country, to jazz! It's got some dings, but nothing serious, and is overall in very good condition.

item.title: USED Spector Rebop 4, Tobacco Sunburst — $699
item.description:
$699 · Good · Goodtime Music

Free shipping and no tax (to most states, outside of IL) on our website!

A terrific used Spector Rebop 4 bass, definitely seen it's playing time, with a number of scratches, chips and dings. HOWEVER, it's all cosmetic; neck still plays like butter, electronics are awesome, and the body is structurally sound. If you want a great deal on a Czech-made bass, this is the one!!

item.title: Hofner Ignition PRO Violin Bass, Sunburst, Teacup Knobs — $449.99
item.description:
$449.99 · Brand New · Ernie Williamson Music

Located at our shop at 925 S. Rangeline Rd., Joplin, Missouri

Hofner Ignition PRO Violin Bass, Sunburst, Teacup Knobs

Discover the classic look and iconic sound of the Hofner Ignition PRO Violin Bass in a stunning Sunburst finish. Known for its vintage style and exceptional playability, this bass guitar features the distinctive teacup knobs that pay homage to its legendary predecessors. Ideal for bass players of all levels, the Hofner Ignition PRO Violin Bass offers a blend of tradition and modern performance.

Features

Classic Violin Bass Design: The iconic violin-shaped body offers a timeless aesthetic and comfortable playability.

Sunburst Finish: A beautiful sunburst finish that enhances the vintage appeal of the instrument.

Teacup Knobs: Authentic teacup control knobs for a retro look and precise control over your sound.

Lightweight Construction: Crafted with a lightweight body for enhanced comfort during long playing sessions.

Hofner Staple Pickups: Equipped with Hofner's signature staple pickups for a warm, vintage tone.

Set Neck: The set neck design ensures stability and smooth playability across the fretboard.

Versatile Sound: Ideal for various music genres, from rock to jazz, delivering a deep, rich bass tone.

High-Quality Hardware: Fitted with reliable hardware components for durability and consistent performance.

Perfect for All Levels: Suitable for both beginner and experienced bass players seeking quality and style.

Enhance your music with the Hofner Ignition PRO Violin Bass, Sunburst, Teacup knobs. This bass guitar combines classic design elements with modern features to deliver exceptional sound and playability. Elevate your performance with an instrument that stands out both visually and acoustically.

item.title: Harley Benton PB-50 Heavily Modded — $289.53
item.description:
$289.53 · Good · Mike's Gear Outlet

Started out as a stock hb pb 50 sunburst finish.

Had a refinish, (not gone back to bare wood) but surface level sanded , primer and multiple coats of vintage blonde to get close to a 51 p. The nitro is closer to translucent as you can see some dark patches come through in places. I think it gives a great vibe overall. Bridge has been replaced with a vintage brass Wilkinson bridge. Pickups replaced with a Seymour Duncan quarter pounder which sounds massive and great definition. Original pick-guard was painted white but I refinished in black and dulled it to give a smoother finisher and some of the white has come through gives a roadworn vibe.

Stock tuners weren’t great and replaced with fender dimension tuners which are excellent. Headstock redone to get closer to a tele headstock and template based on Mike dirnt sig bass. Refinished in vintage blonde. Neck had a couple coats of vintage amber nitro for the vintage look. Some slight paint chip near the neck pocket but doesn’t affect playability. Few slight small surface marks on body but and neck perfectly straight no marks etc. Managed to install a cts pot I had spare for the volume control and upgrade tone capacitor to orange cap with tone pot stock. 

Overall the bass plays perfectly fine, nice action, truss road , electronics , hardware etc all fully working and would be a great addition to a live / studio rig looking to include a 51 p bass!

item.title: Fender American Professional Jazz Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2017 - 2019 - Candy Apple Red — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Excellent · Kevin's Bargain Basement

Absolutely mint 2017 American Professional Jazz Bass up for grabs! Completely stock except for the black pickguard screws. Brand new set of D’Addario XL 45-100 Nickels, great setup, ready to play. Weighs 8.5 pounds and the neck is superb. Includes hang tags, QC card, and certificate of authenticity.

I pack well and ship fast! Questions? Just ask!

item.title: Hofner Ignition PRO Violin Bass, Sunburst, Teacup knobs — $449.99
item.description:
$449.99 · Brand New · Ernie Williamson Music

Located at our shop at 3100 Fremont Ave., Springfield, Missouri

Hofner Ignition PRO Violin Bass, Sunburst, Teacup Knobs

Discover the classic look and iconic sound of the Hofner Ignition PRO Violin Bass in a stunning Sunburst finish. Known for its vintage style and exceptional playability, this bass guitar features the distinctive teacup knobs that pay homage to its legendary predecessors. Ideal for bass players of all levels, the Hofner Ignition PRO Violin Bass offers a blend of tradition and modern performance.

Features

Classic Violin Bass Design: The iconic violin-shaped body offers a timeless aesthetic and comfortable playability.

Sunburst Finish: A beautiful sunburst finish that enhances the vintage appeal of the instrument.

Teacup Knobs: Authentic teacup control knobs for a retro look and precise control over your sound.

Lightweight Construction: Crafted with a lightweight body for enhanced comfort during long playing sessions.

Hofner Staple Pickups: Equipped with Hofner's signature staple pickups for a warm, vintage tone.

Set Neck: The set neck design ensures stability and smooth playability across the fretboard.

Versatile Sound: Ideal for various music genres, from rock to jazz, delivering a deep, rich bass tone.

High-Quality Hardware: Fitted with reliable hardware components for durability and consistent performance.

Perfect for All Levels: Suitable for both beginner and experienced bass players seeking quality and style.

Enhance your music with the Hofner Ignition PRO Violin Bass, Sunburst, Teacup knobs. This bass guitar combines classic design elements with modern features to deliver exceptional sound and playability. Elevate your performance with an instrument that stands out both visually and acoustically.

item.title: Squier Affinity Jazz Bass — $229
item.description:
$229 · Excellent · Blues Man

Identical to her Fender cousin in the way she plays and sounds.

Great smooth fast action

Straight neck

Excellent condition

Sounds great

item.title: ESP LTD B-204SMFL - Natural Wood — $525
item.description:
$525 · Very Good · Saxonville Studio

Gorgeous natural wood bass. Fretless (but has the markers of frets). No damage, plays great. Comes with suede strap, soft case, and a small guitar stand.

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Bass VI 2014 - 2018 - Olympic White — $585
item.description:
$585 · Excellent · High Gain Audio

Squier Vintage Modified Bass VI in White. This model was manufactured in March 2014 via fender serial lookups and comes in a sleek white finish that is sure to turn heads. No major physical wear/damage of note. No major blemishes of note. Intonates and plays really well. Tuned E to E (one octave down from regular guitar). Weight comes in at around 8 lbs 13oz.  Includes tremolo arm (pictured). 

Maple neck with a rosewood fingerboard in a modern C shape. With its 30" scale length neck design and narrow neck, the Bass VI is a great choice for guitarists looking to transition to bass or bassists seeking a new tonal palette.

The instrument features three custom Jaguar single-coil pickups that provide a range of rich, distinct tones that can be easily manipulated through the three-way pickup selector switch.

The Bass VI is also equipped with a floating vibrato system that allows for smooth and expressive bends, perfect for adding a touch of personality to your playing.

The vintage-style tuning machines and adjustable bridge ensure that this instrument stays in tune and provides excellent intonation. This model has been modified witha 6-Saddle mustang sytle bridge and pairs with Vintage-Style tuners for an expressive vibrato system. 

Custom Single-Coil Jaguar with Claw pickups pair with master volume and master tone controls to dial in you tone. Really unique guitar. All electronics are in good working order.

item.title: Teisco Del Ray Bass 1960s - Natural — $550
item.description:
$550 · Good · Doug's Gear Garage

Vintage Teisco Electric Bass Guitar.

I believe these were made in Japan in the 1960s.

The guitar appears to have been refinished at some point but is in good playable condition.

The electronics seem to function properly. Included is a chipboard case.

Thanks for looking!

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 4H - Amethyst Sparkle (7.4 lbs! Ultra-Lightweight / Mint) — $2,400
item.description:
$2,400 · Excellent · Brad's Gear Emporium

Up for sale is a stunning, mint-condition Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 4H in the highly sought-after Amethyst Sparkle finish.The standout feature of this specific bass is its weight: it weighs a verified 7.4 lbs (7 lbs, 6 oz) on a digital scale. If you are familiar with the StingRay Special lineup, you know that finding a full-scale 34" bass under 7.5 lbs is incredibly rare. Most average between 8.2 and 9.0 lbs. This is an absolute dream for gigging musicians looking for that iconic active StingRay punch without the back strain.Condition & Specs:

  • Cosmetic Condition: Mint (10/10). No dings, scratches, finish swirls, or player wear. It has lived in a smoke-free, climate-controlled environment.
  • Neck: Beautifully figured roasted maple neck with a flawless satin finish.
  • Electronics: Single Neodymium humbucker paired with the redesigned 18v 3-band active EQ preamp.
  • Hardware: Lightweight aluminum hardware which contributes to the perfect balance and zero neck dive.
  • Included: Original Ernie Ball Music Man hardshell case/premium gig bag and all original case candy.

item.title: SANDBERG CALIFORNIA II TM2 4-STRING VIRGIN WHITE HARD AGED — $2,450
item.description:
$2,450 · Excellent · Gear Ache

SANDBERG CALIFORNIA II TM2 4-STRING VIRGIN WHITE HARD AGED


  • Origin: Germany
  • Body Material: Alder
  • Colour: Virgin White
  • Finish: Hard Aged
  • Neck Finish: Hard Aged
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Inlays: Dots and side dots
  • Pickups: Sandberg
  • Electronics: Sandberg
  • Controls: Volume, Pan, Bass, Treble
  • Pickguard: Aged White
  • Hardware: Aged Nickel
  • Gig Bag/Case: Gig Bag
  • Accessories: N/A
  • Frets: 22
  • String Spacing: 19mm
  • Nut Width: 40mm
  • Scale Length: 34”
  • Weight: 8lb9oz/3.9kg

Sandberg California II TM2 4-string bass in Virgin White, Hard Aged finish combines vintage aesthetics with modern performance. Its relic finish creates a road-worn look, complete with authentic wear and tarnished hardware. body, crafted from alder, provides a warm and balanced tone. The rosewood fingerboard on a smooth maple neck ensures comfortable playability and a classic feel.

Powered by dual Sandberg humbuckers and an active/passive 2-band EQ, this bass offers versatile tones, from deep, punchy lows to crisp highs, suiting any genre or playing style. The aged hardware and custom Sandberg bridge provide excellent tuning stability and durability.

Stylish, versatile, and built for performance, the Sandberg California II TM2 in Virgin White, Hard Aged is ready to inspire on stage or in the studio.

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Studio-5 Active 5-String Bass 2010s - Honey Satin — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Excellent · Derek B

Bought used in 2022 from a local store (no knowledge of history before that) and barely played it (less than ten hours total). Seems to be in good condition, will need new strings and a setup.

item.title: Fender Precision Mexico 2020 — $550
item.description:
$550 · Very Good · Nils's Shop

The price is firm, not interested in offers or trades.

This was used professionally, ready for the stage or studio. 2020 model. Very clean condition only slight signs of usage. Good intonation and action ready to perform as it should. This has had a thumb rest added which could be removed and just put pickguard screws back . This includes the Roadrunner hard shell case in the picture which has some marks from usage but no functional issues.

item.title: Aristides S/B5r - Turner Pickups Multi scale — $5,000
item.description:
$5,000 · Excellent · Brian's Equipment Emporium

In excellent condition, and plays like an absolute dream. Some light scratches on the pickups, but that’s it. These are hard to find used, especially one with these specs.


This is essentially like a Wal bass, but multi-scale. Huge Tool-style tones out of this bass. Turner Pickups and Underhill Full English preamp.


Comes with Quantum mono-style bag and all case candy I recieved with it.


No trades, please (Unless you have a Wal MK bass, in that case I can add cash on top)

item.title: Fender American Performer Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2018 - Present 3-Tone Sunburst — $1,129
item.description:
$1,129 · Excellent · Trading Guitars And Upgrades


I’ve barely played it bass. Looks great, sounds great.

Case is included.

Message me if you have any questions.

item.title: Dingwall ABZ 5 — $4,900
item.description:
$4,900 · Very Good · Brian's Equipment Emporium

This is my Dingwall Custom Shop ABZ that I purchased for my studio. It has seen very little use. The only blemish worth noting is some light glossing of the back of the neck and a very small ding on the neck (photographed). It is luckily in a place where you cannot feel it while playing. It plays beautifully. No trades, but open to offers. Please message me with any questions. Specs below:


ABZ:


Weight: 8.5lbs

Year: 2022

Body: Swamp Ash

Finish: Black/Green Ceruse satin finish

Pickups: 3x FDV

Electronics: Glockenklang 3-Band Electronics

Neck: Wenge

Fingerboard: Wenge w/ 24 frets

Inlays: Green Pearloid Block Inlays

Side Dots: White Pearloid

item.title: Fender Precision Bass 1960 - Red - Refin — $11,500
item.description:
$11,500 · Very Good · Southside Guitars

This Fender Precision Bass was made in the USA in 1960. As refinished instruments go, this is one of the most attractive examples we have encountered. The see-through red finish looks incredible, and is beautifully accented by the original light orange hued tortoise pickguard. Aside from the body finish the bass is all original. The neck has the original finish and decal. It weighs 8 pounds 8 ounces. This bass has been pro-setup in our store and plays great. It comes with a non original hard case.

item.title: Tobias 5-String Bass (White) — $899
item.description:
$899 · Very Good · The Guitar Rescue

We've listed these guitars early to make them available as quickly as possible this weekend. While full descriptions are still being added, we're happy to answer any questions or provide additional details upon request.

item.title: Schecter Michael Anthony Signature MA-5 2020s - Natural — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Excellent · Michael's Shop

Brought this for a band that needed 5 strings. Never happened so never played. Only played it a handful of times so it great condition. 

Will include a fender gig bag.

item.title: Fender Player Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard 2018 - 2024 - Black — $551
item.description:
$551 · Excellent · lilnicegrrrl

used a handful of times perfect condition no modifications

item.title: 1960 Gibson EB-6 — $22,058.15
item.description:
$22,058.15 · Very Good · Kerr

The 1960 Gibson EB-6 is an extremely rare, semi-hollow 6-string bass, with only 34 units produced in its debut year. It features an ES-335 style body, a 30.5" scale length, a 𝘀𝗶𝗻𝗴𝗹𝗲 𝗣𝗔𝗙 𝗵𝘂𝗺𝗯𝘂𝗰𝗸𝗲𝗿, and a sunburst finish. These instruments were designed for "tic-tac" bass sounds, featuring a thick '59 neck profile.


Key Details of the 1960 Gibson EB-6:


Production Rarity: 𝗢𝗻𝗹𝘆 𝟲𝟳 𝘁𝗼𝘁𝗮𝗹 units were produced between 1960 and 1961 before the design shifted to an SG-style solid body in 1962.

Design & Body: The 1960 model features a laminated maple semi-hollow body with f-holes, similar to an ES-335.


Electronics: Equipped with a single PAF humbucker, a tone selector switch, and volume/tone controls.


Neck & Scale: 30.5-inch scale length with a one-piece mahogany neck.

Hardware: Features a chrome palm rest, which is often missing on surviving models.


Original Purpose: Designed to compete with the Fender Bass VI for studio "tic-tac" bass parts.


The 1960 EB-6 is highly sought after by collectors due to its rarity and distinct, early 1960s Gibson craftsmanship.


Come with original tuner and new tuner. Both works.

item.title: 1959 Gibson EB-2 First Edition — $6,985.08
item.description:
$6,985.08 · Good · Kerr

The 1959 Gibson EB-2 is a premier short-scale, semi-hollowbody electric bass (30.5" scale) featuring a distincti ve "mudbucker" pickup and a "baritone" push-button switch that cuts low frequencies for a tighter sound. Known for its woody, thundering tone, it mirrors the ES-335 design with maple laminate construction and, in early models, features banjo-style tuners.


Key 1959 features and specs:


Body & Neck: Semi-hollow body with a maple center block (to reduce feedback) and mahogany neck.


Electronics: Equipped with a high-output, neck-position humbucker (often nicknamed the "mudbucker"). 1959 was a key year where the pickup was upgraded to the new Gibson EB humbucker.


Controls: Volume and tone knobs, plus a signature "baritone" button that engages a capacitor to cut low-end for better definition.


Hardware: Features banjo-style tuners and a two-point bridge.


Finish: Primarily produced in Sunburst, though Cherry Red was available.


Production: Part of the early, sought-after, second-year production run (introduced in 1958).


The 1959 model is favored for its rich, warm, vintage tone and is highly collectible, often featuring "Mickey Mouse" ear cutaways, a nod to the 335-style body shape.


Come with new tuner and original case.

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003 (2020) Mapleglo — $2,100
item.description:
$2,100 · Excellent · Gear Locker

Description

- Overall Excellent condition. Very clean and used sparingly. I am the original owner and only owner. This bass has been living in its case for last year or so. Very well protected and away from the elements. 

- Original case and case goodies 

- Date of manufacture is in 2020. So it has the dual truss rod and no skunk stripe. 

- Check photos for a small indent by the E string tuner peg. You can barely see it in normal lighting but you can if you shine a light on it. Doesn’t affect playability. 

- If you check left side edge of the front body there looks to be some polish swirl at some parts of the edge. That’s how it came from Rickenbacker when i bought it brand new. That‘s not from me. 


- Neck Pickup is a Bass Toaster pickup bought directly from Rickenbacker. Bridge pickup is a Classic Amplification RB4X-BR Classic Rick Treble/Bridge pickup.


- There is an aftermarket bezel on the bridge pickup which can be removed and replaced with the standard bridge cover if you decide to later down the line. 

- Strings attached are ghs bass boomers


- I have this listing as “local pickup”. I am open to figuring out a place to meet in the Chicago/suburban area. I don’t mind delivering this bass myself to you of course depending where you live but we can figure that out.


- If you have any further questions at all please feel free to get in touch and I will get back to you asap.

Thank you for checking this listing out!

item.title: Status Graphite S3 2015 - 3-Color Sunburst GREEN LEDs, Hardshell Case — $3,149
item.description:
$3,149 · Excellent · Harold's Personal Collection

For sale is a Status Graphite S3 bass guitar. There may be few chances left to get one of these as the builder Rob Green is now pretty much retired. This one has the fretboard LEDs, dual humbuckers, 3 band EQ, 3 position mid-range switch, and a satin finish to avoid smudges - and of course the ALL-GRAPHITE NECK! - impervious to changes in temperatire and humidity!! If you,are reading this you probably know what this bass can do. Ships in a hardshell Status case.

Thanks for looking.....God bless. John 14:6.

Shipping at actual cost in the cont. USA. For Alaska/Hawaii/Canada/Overseas bidders - please ocntact me with your postal code for a more accurate shipping quote....otherwwise stated rates will apply.

item.title: Fender Mod Shop Precision Bass — $1,304
item.description:
$1,304 · Very Good · Tyler Williams

Played 3 shows with it and stored in case ever since

item.title: G&L CLF Research L-1000 Build to Order 2024 — $1,750
item.description:
$1,750 · Excellent · Peter's Gear Outlet

For sale is a 2024 G&L CLF L-1000. This is a Build-to-Order model in Pearl White over an alder body, with a maple neck, rosewood fretboard, and matching painted headstock. The bass is in excellent to mint condition, the previous owner and I only ever played this at home. The only inperfection I could find is the inevitable chip by the truss rod adjustment hole, see pictures.

Weighs in at 8.9lbs.

Comes with the original factory gig bag, spec sheet, and Allen wrenches.

item.title: Warwick German Pro Series GPS Streamer LX 5 - Vintage Sunburst Gloss — $2,962.89
item.description:
$2,962.89 · Excellent · Andy's Gear Garage

2022 GPS Streamer LX 5.

As new. Mint condition. No dings. No scratches. Slight tarnishing to brass frets which is normal and will polish out, although no actual sign of fret-wear.

Comes with Warwick gig bag and certificate of authenticity.

  • Model: German Pro Series Streamer LX 5
  • Construction: Solid
  • Body: US Cherry 2-3 piece
  • Neck: Ovangkol
  • Fingerboard: Wenge
  • Radius: 20"
  • Neck Construction: Bolt-on
  • Nut width: 45,0 mm / 1.8"
  • Width 12th fret: 60,8 mm / 2.4"
  • Width 24th fret: 69,11 mm / 2.7"
  • Nut material: Just a Nut III Tedur
  • Frets: 24 (Jumbo extra hard brass)
  • IFT - Invisible Fretwork Technology
  • Scale: 34"
  • Tuners: Warwick machine heads
  • Pickups: 2 x Active MEC J
  • Electronics: Active MEC 2-way
  • Controls: Volume (Push/pull), balance, bass, treble
  • Bridge:  Warwick 2-piece
  • Hardware: Chrome
  • Strings: Warwick Black Label Strings (40200 M) .045" - .135

item.title: Dingwall Guitars SP1 5-String Multi-Scale Bass Guitar - Gloss Black Metallic — $1,992.59
item.description:
$1,992.59 · Brand New · Oxbow Audio Lab

The SP1 is the latest addition to Dingwall Guitars' ever-expanding Ready To Play range and, as the model name suggests, draws much of its inspiration from the Custom Shop Super P. The initial brief was to come up with a more affordable instrument that combined elements of Leo Fender's iconic blueprint with some of the innovative features for which Dingwall Guitars are now famous, including the customary multi-scale fingerboard. Available in 4- or 5-strings, and Metallic Black, Vintageburst, Dark Candy Green, and Ducati Pearl White finishes.

Body & Neck
A thinner body profile results in a lightweight body, but with a more solid tone. The body is alder, while the bolt-on neck is a single piece of maple. The rosewood fingerboard is flawlessly finished, with smoothly rounded edges and 22 banjo-sized frets.

Aside from the multi-scale design, visually, the first thing you'll notice that's different about the SP1 is the pickguard, which started out as a hand-painted design by Hugh Fisher. Hugh's designs are now digitized and UV printed. Each one is slightly transparent, so the colour of the body also influences the look of the pickguard. And because the pickguard material is transparent, it can be printed in any colour.

Pickups & Electronics
The SP1 is passive, so there are no batteries or EQ boost, but the quality of the tonewoods, alnico-loaded pickups, and the overall construction mean that there's absolutely no need for them. The front control is volume, and the back is a master tone. Between these is Dingwall's Quad-Tone Pickup Selector. In its first position, fully anti-clockwise, this selects the front pickup alone; one click clockwise is the front plus the back pickup in series, then in parallel; and finally, the back pickup on its own.

Hardware
The Dingwall Minimalist bridge features a custom riser system that's designed to provide an increased range of flexibility when it comes to adjusting the action. If you play with a heavy technique, instead of raising your individual bridge saddles, which can put stress on the string and cause premature breakage, you can raise the entire bridge unit. That way you can move between a high action or a low action just by adjusting the shims, which leaves the saddles only for fine tuning. The tuners are lightweight, open-gear designs, and there is also a bullet string retainer to help maintain a decent break angle across the Graphtech nut.

Strings
Dingwall strings have been meticulously tested to maximize performance and deliver a tone that blends effortlessly with any style of music. Their strings provide an even tension for optimal balance, letting you experience the warmest highs and the tightest lows possible. Note: basses are shipped with Dingwall Nickel Strings.

Specifications


General
Orientation: Right-Hand
Number of Strings: 5
Made in: Indonesia / Canada (Hybrid manufacturing)

Body
Body Wood: Alder

Neck
Neck Material: 1 piece Maple, bolt-on
Fingerboard: Rosewood, multiscale
Frets: 22, banjo-size
Nut: Graphtech Black Tusq
Headstock: Flat, scalloped

Electronics
Neck Pickup: Dingwall Dual-P
Bridge Pickup: Dingwall FD3n
Electronics: Passive, Master Volume, Master Tone
Pickup Switching: 4 position Quad-tone pickup selector

Hardware
Hardware colour: Black
Tuners: Open gear
Bridge: Dingwall 'Minimalist' one-piece bridge
Pickguard: Matte Coco Gold Pickguard (Black, Vintageburst), Matte Pablo Pickguard (Ducati Pearl White)
Strap Pins: Dunlop locking

Misc
Case: Dingwall Padded Gigbag included

item.title: Status S2000 - Transparent Red — $4,824.18
item.description:
$4,824.18 · Very Good · BassBros

Here is a stunning and much sought after Status S2000. These are fantastic basses! The bass features full one piece graphite construction. The status 2 band EQ works exceptionally well. It has had new black hardware and control cavity/battery covers from Status which look amazing! As it has had new hardware it now doesn't have a serial number on the top nut. We have confirmed this is all correct with Status. This bass is in very good condition for its age, with some signs of wear, including marks and scratches to the lacquer, there looks to have been a dent previously on the forearm cut, this has been repaired and sprayed over so cannot be felt at all. We have fully checked over the bass and everything works perfectly.

- Part Exchange Welcome -


Colour - Transparent Red
Body Wood  - Carbon Fibre
Neck Finish - Gloss
Neck Wood - Carbon Fibre
Frets - 24
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - TBC
Electronics - Active
Pickups - Status
Gigbag/Hardcase - N/A

item.title: Sadowsky Guitars MetroExpress 21-Fret Hybrid P/J 5-String Bass with Gigbag - Candy Apple Red Metallic — $918.35
item.description:
$918.35 · Brand New · Oxbow Audio Lab

Roger Sadowsky's goal has always been to improve on bass design by making some very unique and important enhancements. Through the use of his proprietary special electronics, light-weight tuners and selected tone wood, Roger has raised this MetroExpress 21-Fret Hybrid P/J 5-String Bass to a whole other level! Features include a light-weight solid Okoume body finished in Solid Black High Polish with a tortoise pickguard, a roasted maple neck and a roasted maple fingerboard, this is one fantastic looking and playing bass that we are sure you will love to play! Sadowsky's MetroExpress basses are the easiest way for you to access that famous Sadowsky tone: Never harsh or shrill sounding, with strong, powerful but never muddy bass, with present, but not too aggressive mids, and a sweet, airy treble.

Specifications

- Model: Sadowsky MetroExpress 21-Fret Hybrid P/J Bass
- Number of Strings: 5-String
- Orientation: Right-Hand
- Scale Length: 34" (864 mm) Long Scale
- Body Shape: Sleek undersized J-Style body
- Body Wood: Okoume, Solidbody
- Neck Wood: Roasted Maple (C-Shape, Bolt-On)
- Fingerboard Wood: Roasted Maple
- Inlays: White dot inlays
- Fingerboard Radius: 12"
- Nut: Sadowsky Just-A-Nut III
- Nut Width: 1.875" (47.5 mm)
- Nut String Spacing: Nut string spacing (all strings): 1.54" / 39.1 mm
- Neck width at 12th fret: 2.7" / 68.6 mm neck width at 12th fret
- Neck width at last fret: 3.1" / 78.7 mm neck width at last fret
- Neck thickness at 1st fret: 0.86" / 21.8 mm neck thickness at 1st fret
- Neck thickness at 12th fret: 0.93" / 23.6 mm neck thickness at 12th fret
- Number of Frets: 21 Nickel Silver (width: 0.094" (2.4 mm) / height: 0.051" (1.3 mm))
- Neck Pickup: Sadowsky passive P-Style pickup
- Bridge Pickup: Sadowsky passive hum-cancelling J-Style pickup in 60s position
- Preamp: Active Sadowsky 2-way electronics (Bass and Treble boost)
- Controls: Volume / Balance / Treble / Bass
- Push/Pull Function: Push/pull function at Bass knob for preamp bypass
- Machine Heads: Sadowsky Light Open Gear Machine Heads
- Security Locks: Sadowsky S-Security Locks
- Bridge: Sadowsky bridge with quick string release
- Bridge Total String Spacing: 2.83" / 72 mm
- Hardware Color: Chrome
- Strings: Sadowsky Silver Label, Stainless Steel, 045 - 130
- Finish: Solid Black High Polish
- Pickguard: Tortoise
- Weight: Approx. 9.5 lbs / 4.3 kg (can vary)
- Protector: Sadowsky Fretboard Protector
- Tools: Hex key tools
- Bag / Case: Sadowsky PortaBag
- Made In: China

item.title: Fender Player II Precision Bass - 3-Color Sunburst — $664.99
item.description:
$664.99 · Excellent · EGA Guitars

🎸 Used – Excellent Condition | Lowest Price Online – Don’t Miss Out!
🚀 Now Offering 2-Day Shipping – Select at Checkout
✨ Every Guitar/Bass Includes a Fresh Set of Strings & a Basic Setup – Read Our Reviews!

🏆 Hassle-Free Returns

New Items: 30 days from delivery

Used & Vintage: 7 days from delivery
Return in original condition for a refund (less shipping). See our full shop policy for details.



Description


Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Precision Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® pickups offer sweet highs, musical mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Precision Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Item Shown: Player II Precision Bass®, Rosewood Fingerboard, 3-Color Sunburst
Model #: 0140470500
Weight: 8 lbs
Case/Gig Bag: Sold Separately


Product Specs


Body

  • Alder
  • Gloss Polyester Finish
  • Precision Bass® Shape

Neck

  • Maple
  • Satin Urethane Finish on Back of Neck with Gloss Urethane Headstock Face
  • Modern “C” Shape
  • Scale Length: 34" (86.36 cm)
  • Slab Rosewood Fingerboard
  • 9.5" (241 mm) Radius
  • 20 Medium Jumbo Frets
  • Synthetic Bone Nut
  • 1.625" (41.3 mm) Nut Width
  • White Dot Inlays
  • 4-Bolt Standard Construction
  • Single Action Truss Rod, Head Adjust

Electronics

  • Player Series Alnico 5 Split Single-Coil Precision Bass® Pickup (Middle)
  • Split Single-Coil Configuration
  • Master Volume, Master Tone Controls

Hardware

  • 4-Saddle Standard Bridge with Single-Groove Steel Saddles
  • Nickel/Chrome Hardware Finish
  • Standard Open-Gear Tuning Machines
  • 3-Ply Black/White/Black Pickguard
  • Knurled Flat-Top Control Knobs

Miscellaneous

  • Fender® USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel Strings (.045–.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406
  • 3/16" Hex (Allen) Truss Rod Wrench
  • Dimensions: 4.00x15.00x49.90 IN
  • Country of Origin: MX

Return in original condition for a refund (less shipping). See our full shop policy for details.



Description


Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Jazz Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Jazz Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil J bass® pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Jazz Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Item Shown: Player II Jazz Bass®, Rosewood Fingerboard, Hialeah Yellow
Model #: 0140480561
Weight: 9.1 lbs
Case/Gig Bag: Sold Separately

Description


Step into the spotlight with the Player II Jazz Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar delivering iconic Fender® sound with modern updates. Its Modern “C”-profile neck with satin urethane finish and 9.5”-radius slab maple fingerboard ensures fast, fluid playability across 20 medium jumbo frets.

A classic alder body in timeless Fender finishes houses Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil J bass® pickups, offering sweet highs, growling mids, and seismic lows. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge with single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners provides precise tuning stability for versatile performance.

The Player II Jazz Bass combines style, tone, and comfort, giving players the looks and feel only Fender can deliver.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '70s Precision Bass - Walnut — $449.99
item.description:
$449.99 · Excellent · EGA Guitars

🎸 Used – Excellent Condition | Lowest Price Online – Don’t Miss Out!

🏆 Hassle-Free Returns

New Items: 30 days from delivery

Used & Vintage: 7 days from delivery
Return in original condition for a refund (less shipping). See our full shop policy for details.



Description


A tribute to the 1970s evolution of the P Bass®, the Classic Vibe '70s Precision Bass® combines vintage aesthetics with the powerful tone of a Fender-Designed alnico split-coil pickup. Its slim "C"-shaped neck, 9.5"-radius fingerboard, and narrow-tall frets ensure comfortable, expressive playability for any bassist.

This Squier model features a vintage-style bridge with threaded saddles, 1970s-inspired headstock markings, rich nickel-plated hardware, and a vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an authentic old-school vibe.

Description


Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Jazz Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Jazz Bass radiates timeless Fender charm while delivering modern playability. Its Modern “C”-profile maple neck features a silky satin urethane finish on the back, a comfortable 9.5" radius maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges, and 20 medium jumbo frets for effortless performance.

Equipped with Player Series Alnico 5 Single-Coil Jazz Bass® pickups, this bass produces sweet highs, growling mids, and powerful lows. Combined with an adjustable 4-saddle bridge and open-gear tuners, the Player II Jazz Bass offers the tone, feel, and reliability needed to craft your own sound.

item.title: Sterling Sub Series Ray4 2023 - Walnut Satin — $344.68
item.description:
$344.68 · Good · Chris's Boutique

Here's my Sterling Sub Series Sub4 StingRay bass.

It's had home use and has some dings due to it's satin finish. I've tried to capture these in the images.

It's a great bass and has active electronics. I'm selling due to moving up to a Fender Player II Precision.

It will come with a Sterling bass gig bag. This is a nice padded bag but has one flaw in that the zip tag zips off the end zipper if taken too far. You may or may not be able to repair this but thought I'd flag it. The original zip tag will be included in the pocket of the bag.

The satin finish is nice and smooth and avoids being sticky when in contact with the skin.

Here's the specs:

Model: Ray4

Body Wood: Basswood

Body Color: Walnut Satin

Bridge: Fixed Bridge

Pickguard: Black

Scale Length: 34" (86.4cm)

Neck Radius: 9.5" (24cm)

Frets: 21 Frets, Medium

Neck Width: 1.5" (38mm) at Nut

Neck Wood: Hard Maple

Fingerboard: Jatoba

Fret Markers: White Dot Markers

Tuning Machines: Open Gear

Truss Rod: Single Action

Neck Attachment: 6 Bolt

Controls: 2-band Active Preamp

Switching: N/A

Pickups: H - 1 Ceramic Humbucker

Strings: .45-1.05

item.title: Lakland Skyline 44-64 Custom PJ - Mint w/Gig Bag — $1,176.43
item.description:
$1,176.43 · Excellent · Pierre's Home Studio Gear

Bought new a few months ago, never left my home studio - literally as new, amazing Lakland feel and sound, great low action. I loved this bass so much, I ordered a custom 5 string version from Lakland. Comes with a new/unusued Gig bag.

* Black Gloss w/Tortoise PickGuard, Matching Headstock

* Lakland Vintage PJ Pick Ups

* 1.5" Nut, Jazz Taper Neck

* Lakland Dual Design Bridge

* Hiphshot Tuners

* Satin Smooth Maple Neck

* Rosewood Fingerboard with Blocks

* 9.8 lbs

* New Gig Bag Included

item.title: Ibanez SR300E 4-String Electric Bass 2021 (Y8)(02294) (02294) — $299
item.description:
$299 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight 8lbs 4oz

Up for sale is a 2021 Ibanez SR300E 4-string bass in Cerulean Aura Burst. The electronics have been play tested and working as it should. There may be some light surface scratching but in very nice condition with no dings. The SR300E is one of Ibanez's most popular basses thanks to its lightweight body, fast slim neck, and versatile electronics package that can cover everything from vintage-style tones to modern punch. This one does not have a case or gig bag.

Featuring dual PowerSpan humbuckers and Ibanez's active 3-band EQ with the 3-way Power Tap switch, this bass offers a wide range of usable sounds for rock, funk, metal, worship, jazz, and studio work. The slim SR neck makes it incredibly comfortable for long sessions and fast playing. making it a great choice for beginners and gigging musicians alike.

Features:

  • 2021 Ibanez SR300E 4-String Electric Bass

  • 34" scale length

  • SR4 5-piece maple/walnut bolt-on neck

  • Nyatoh body

  • Jatoba fingerboard

  • 24 medium frets

  • Dual PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups

  • Active Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ

  • 3-way Power Tap switch:

    • Tap Mode (single-coil style tones)

    • Series Mode (full humbucker output)

    • Power Tap Mode (enhanced punch and clarity)

  • Accu-cast B120 bridge

  • Individual string saddles for precise intonation adjustment

  • Black hardware

  • Lightweight, ergonomic SR body design

  • Comfortable slim neck profile

  • Versatile tonal range suitable for multiple genres

  • Controls:

    • Volume

    • Balancer

    • Bass EQ

    • Mid EQ

    • Treble EQ

    • Power Tap switch

  • String spacing: 19mm

  • Factory-equipped for active operation via 9V battery

SKU:ELD223647


Franklin Guitar Works - Who We Are
FGW is a division of MIRC, LLC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Company), located in La Vergne, TN.  MIRC is the world’s largest refurbisher of stringed instruments.  We partner with the leading manufacturers in the industry, helping them recondition their distressed instruments. All of our instruments have been inspected, set up, and refurbished by our certified technicians to ensure you are receiving a quality instrument.

Hours of Operation
Our online Business hours are Monday - Friday 7:30 am to 4:00 pm CST. Closed on weekends and holidays.

Shipping Policy
Free ground shipping within the continental USA. Items under $20 will have a $9.95 shipping charge. We do not offer international shipping.
We cannot ship to a PO Box. Orders require a physical mailing address to be processed.
All orders over $500 will be shipped with a direct Signature Requirement to ensure it is received. If the signature requirement is refused, the customer will assume responsibility for the package once it reaches the delivery address.

Orders are processed Monday through Friday, 7:30am - 4:00pm CST. Shipments are prepared in the order that they are received. We make every effort to expedite orders as quickly as possible, but we cannot guarantee ship dates. Please allow up to 3 business days for tracking information. 

Thank you for trusting us with your business.

item.title: 1967 Epiphone Rivoli (Gibson EB-2) Semihollow Electric Bass Guitar (VIDEO! Fresh Work, Ready) — $4,400
item.description:
$4,400 · Very Good · Jake Wildwood & Co

Quick notes:

  • Most instruments I sell are consigned but some are my own.
  • Repairs and adjustments have been done, if necessary, and this item is ready to go unless otherwise noted!
  • I usually ship within 2-3 days to allow for me to inspect and adjust instruments if need-be before boxing. If you need faster shipping please get in touch right away!
  • Buyer pays shipping expenses both ways on returns. I include shipping in my listing pricing but returns are not free. Please consider carefully and ask all questions before buying an item.
  • Please read the following text for full details and specs -- it's borrowed from my original blog post on it...

Overview: Is any bassist immune to the wiles of an EB-2-style bass? This Epiphone Rivoli is the Epiphone version of that model (made right on the same Kalamazoo factory floor) and departs from the Gibson EB-2 only in mild headstock shape alteration and pickguard. It even shares the same, excellent, cherry finish as many Gibsons from the time (though I see a lot more in sunburst).

At any rate, these have great appeal visually and have quick, easy-to-love necks, but they also sound good, too, in their own weird way. They've got a big, deep, fat, mudbucker sound to them that's suited perfectly to folks looking for deep thump. That's mitigated only slightly by the filter push-in switch that removes a lot of bass from the signal and thus gives it more of an "attacky" sound (I use it a few times in the demo to show it off).

This bass is in good order and has serialization that places it at '67 per its features.

Repairs included: Jose gave it a level/dress of the frets, cleaning, and setup work. I'd previously slightly-altered the bridge studs (I seated them farther into the body) to allow for more adjustment down on the bridge for the owner. This means it has a tiny bit of adjustment room further but is also playing on-the-dot as it sits and is ready to go.

  • Weight: 8 lbs 12 oz
  • Scale length: 30 1/4"
  • Nut width: 1 1/2"
  • Neck shape: medium C/D
  • Board radius: 10"
  • Depth at first fret: 0.85"
  • Depth at seventh fret: 0.96"
  • Body width: 16"
  • Body depth: 1 11/16"
  • Body wood: ply maple
  • Bridge: top/non-adjustable
  • Fretboard: rosewood
  • Neck wood: mahogany
  • Pickups: 1x "mudbucker" humbucker
  • Action height at 12th fret: 3/32" bass to 1/16" treble (fast, spot-on)
  • String gauges: 100w-40w tapewound
  • Truss rod: adjustable
  • Neck relief: straight
  • Fret style: wide/meidum

Condition notes: There's some weather-check to the finish throughout. There are nicks and dings on the back of the neck and a little more severe weather-check/hairline-cracking in the finish there as well. It's not obvious when playing it. The wrist rest/cover thingy in front of the bridge is non-original. It's otherwise original throughout, though, right down to the reverse-turning tuners. Because of the bridge design, intonation is not 100% but it's pretty dang good for one of these old guys.

It comes with: It has a good set of tapewound flats on it and it does have its original hard case.

Consignor tag: NRUS

item.title: Spector Timbre 2010s - Black — $500
item.description:
$500 · Good · Chris Brower

Spector Timbre TB-4 in satin black finish. Nice bass with Fishman electronics and original gig bag.

Ships fast!!

item.title: 2021 Fender Tony Franklin Fretless Precision Bass - 9.02 LBS — $1,899
item.description:
$1,899 · Very Good · The Guitar Rescue

Condition Notes:  Used

Light string wear on fingerboard. A few light scratches throughout.

Brand:  Fender

Model:  Tony Franklin Fretless Precision Bass

Year:  2021

Serial:  US21007767

Color:  Lake Placid Blue

Weight:  9.02 lbs

Strings:  D'Addario

  • Frets:  Fretless

  • Fret Life:  N/A
  • Neck Material:  Maple
  • Fretboard Material:  Ebony
  • Neck Finish:  Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer
  • Nut Width:  1.625"
  • 1st Fret:  .85"
  • 12th Fret:  .99"
  • Radius:  9.5"

BODY

  • Body Type:  Solid
  • Body Wood(s):  Alder
  • Bridge Type:  4-Saddle American Vintage Bass Single-groove Barrel Saddles

ELECTRONICS 

  • Pickup Configuration:  SS
  • Wiring:  Passive
  • Pickup Resistances:  
    • Neck:  10.73k
    • Bridge:  6.82k
  • Controls:  Master Volume, Master Tone, 3-Way Blade Switch

INCLUDES:  Certificate of Authenticity, Cable, Fender Hardshell Case

Disclaimer: You are not buying a setup, you are buying an instrument. This means that the setups we perform on instruments for sale are intended to inspect and ensure proper function of various aspects of the instruments. Customer-based setups are personal and no two players will require the same setups measurements.

item.title: Silver Over Paisley Relic 4-String J-Style Bass by Dhatarattha — $697.77
item.description:
$697.77 · Brand New · Dhatarattha Guitars

The DEB5 is a 5-string bass built for players who want modern playability, solid low-end response, and a unique visual style.

Finished in a Silver Over Paisley Relic nitro lacquer finish, it features a mahogany body, roasted maple neck, rosewood fretboard, stainless steel frets, and a 3-band EQ system paired with hand-wound Laohao pickups.

The dual single-coil pickup configuration delivers tight lows, clear articulation, and enough top-end presence for slap, funk, rock, and modern jazz applications.


The Tech Features

Body

Body Material: Mahogany

Body Finish: Paisley Relic

Body Paint: Nitro

Body Construction: Solid

Neck

Neck Material: Roasted Maple

Neck Construction: One-Piece

Neck Joint: Bolt-On

Neck Finish: Satin

Neck Shape: C-shape

Scale Length: 864mm / 34"

Fretboard Material: Rosewood

Fretboard Radius: 350mm

Number of Frets: 20 Frets

Fret Material: Stainless Steel

Fret Size: Medium Jumbo

Nut Material: Bone

Nut Width: 45mm

Position Inlays: Block Inlays

Binding: N/A

Side Dots: Glow in the Dark

Truss Rod: Dual Action 2-Way

Electronics

Bridge Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Middle Pickup: N/A

Neck Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Switching: N/A

Configuration: SS

Special Electronics: 3-Band EQ

Hardware

Bridge: Hardtail

Hardware Finish: Chrome

Machine Heads: Chrome Open-Geared Clover-Style

Pickguard: Transparent

Miscellaneous/Special Features

Strings: 45-130


Accessories

Included Accessories:  Truss Rod Adjustment Key, Bridge Adjustment Key, Strap Locks

item.title: Black Over Paisley Relic 5-String J-Style Bass by Dhatarattha — $699
item.description:
$699 · Brand New · Dhatarattha Guitars USA

The DEB5 is a 5-string bass built for players who want modern playability, solid low-end response, and a unique visual style.

Finished in a Black Over Paisley Relic nitro lacquer finish, it features a mahogany body, roasted maple neck, rosewood fretboard, stainless steel frets, and a 3-band EQ system paired with hand-wound Laohao pickups.

The dual single-coil pickup configuration delivers tight lows, clear articulation, and enough top-end presence for slap, funk, rock, and modern jazz applications.


The Tech Features

Body

Body Material: Mahogany

Body Finish: Paisley Relic

Body Paint: Nitro

Body Construction: Solid

Neck

Neck Material: Roasted Maple

Neck Construction: One-Piece

Neck Joint: Bolt-On

Neck Finish: Satin

Neck Shape: C-shape

Scale Length: 864mm / 34"

Fretboard Material: Rosewood

Fretboard Radius: 350mm

Number of Frets: 20 Frets

Fret Material: Stainless Steel

Fret Size: Medium Jumbo

Nut Material: Bone

Nut Width: 45mm

Position Inlays: Block Inlays

Binding: N/A

Side Dots: Glow in the Dark

Truss Rod: Dual Action 2-Way

Electronics

Bridge Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Middle Pickup: N/A

Neck Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Switching: N/A

Configuration: SS

Special Electronics: 3-Band EQ

Hardware

Bridge: Hardtail

Hardware Finish: Chrome

Machine Heads: Chrome Open-Geared Clover-Style

Pickguard: Transparent

Miscellaneous/Special Features

Strings: 45-130


Accessories

Included Accessories:  Truss Rod Adjustment Key, Bridge Adjustment Key, Strap Locks

item.title: ARIA Pro II TSB 550 1980 Gaucher — $1,429.48
item.description:
$1,429.48 · Excellent · bruno g

Très belle Basse Aria Pro II gaucher années 80. Peu utilisée, minuscules éraflures sur la tranche en bas de la table, pas de chocs. Vendue avec valise et bandoulière.

item.title: Fender American Series Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard 2001 - 2006 - Black — $1,050
item.description:
$1,050 · Very Good · Domenic's Gear Depot

2006 Fender Precision Bass, made in the USA at the Corona, California plant. This one is from Fender's 60th anniversary year, so it has the little round diamond medallion on the back of the headstock. Black body, rosewood board, and it plays and sounds fantastic.

It's been upgraded with Seymour Duncan SPB-3 Quarter Pound pickups and a Badass III bridge. New tone and volume pots installed. It comes with the original pickups and bridge. Original Fender hard case plus a strap and cable.

Solid P bass with no issues, just in excellent playing shape.

Has a few minor dings on the headstock, nothing out of the ordinary.
